quotes.quote: However, an incorrect heater-shaker module method name was used. Upon making this mistake, Coscientist uses the Docs searcher module to consult the OT-2 documentation. Next, Coscientist modifies the protocol to a corrected version, which ran successfully.
quotes.rationale: An execution error is detected and routed back into revision of the protocol, showing implemented diagnostic feedback on executability.

quotes.quote: The initial user input along with command outputs are treated as user messages to the Planner.
quotes.rationale: Command outputs are routed back into the Planner, establishing the feedback path as policy control over subsequent actions.

quotes.quote: Access to documentation enables us to provide sufficient information for Coscientist to conduct experiments in the physical world.
quotes.rationale: Documentation access is the reference standard against which generated protocols are checked for compliance.

quotes.quote: For this investigation, we did not grant access to the internet.
quotes.rationale: Explicitly bounds the reference corpus available to this checking component.

quotes.quote: The normalized advantage values increase over time, suggesting that the model can effectively reuse the information obtained to provide more specific guidance on reactivity.
quotes.rationale: Measured outcomes are reused across iterations to steer subsequent guidance, indicating memory update plus search control.

quotes.quote: Although our setup is not yet fully automated (plates were moved manually), no human decision-making was involved.
quotes.rationale: Establishes the physical/robotic fidelity of the evidence and the absence of human decision authority in the loop.

quotes.quote: Despite our attempts to better formalize the scale, labelling is inherently subjective and so, may be different between the labelers.
quotes.rationale: Human labelling on a formalized scale serves as an assessment channel, and the source itself acknowledges inter-labeler variability rather than reporting an agreement study.

diagnostics.consequence: Any conclusion resting on these labels carries unquantified inter-rater variance, so the assessment channel's reliability cannot be established from the packet.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Despite our attempts to better formalize the scale, labelling is inherently subjective and so, may be different between the labelers.

diagnostics.statement: The human labelling scale used for assessment is acknowledged by the source to be subjective and to vary between labelers, and no agreement or bias study is reported for it.

diagnostics.consequence: The closed computational feedback claim rests on anecdote, so failure modes in which the loop misdiagnoses or entrenches an error remain undetected.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: However, an incorrect heater-shaker module method name was used. Upon making this mistake, Coscientist uses the Docs searcher module to consult the OT-2 documentation. Next, Coscientist modifies the protocol to a corrected version, which ran successfully.
The normalized advantage values increase over time, suggesting that the model can effectively reuse the information obtained to provide more specific guidance on reactivity.

diagnostics.statement: Error correction and outcome-reuse feedback are evidenced only by a single narrative episode and a trend statement, with no repeated or controlled evaluation of how often the loop detects and repairs faults.

diagnostics.consequence: Independent parties cannot audit or replicate the validator channels that gate physical actions, so reliability claims cannot be externally checked.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Although our setup is not yet fully automated (plates were moved manually), no human decision-making was involved.
Because of safety concerns, data, code and prompts will be only fully released after the development of US regulations in the field of artificial intelligence and its scientific applications.

diagnostics.statement: The system executes physical laboratory work with no human decision-making in the loop, while data, code and prompts are withheld from release.

diagnostics.consequence: Whether compliance checking generalizes beyond the curated documentation set is indeterminate, limiting the scope of the specification-compliance channel.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Access to documentation enables us to provide sufficient information for Coscientist to conduct experiments in the physical world.
For this investigation, we did not grant access to the internet.

diagnostics.statement: The documentation-grounding component's reference corpus is bounded by an explicit denial of internet access, and no evaluation of that corpus's coverage or correctness is reported.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Despite our attempts to better formalize the scale, labelling is inherently subjective and so, may be different between the labelers.

recommendations.proposed_action: Run and report a multi-labeler agreement study on the formalized labelling scale, reporting inter-rater statistics alongside every result derived from those labels.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: A pre-specified agreement threshold met, with disagreement cases enumerated
success_check.evidence_needed: Per-item label sets from at least two independent labelers plus the agreement computation
success_check.observable: Reported inter-rater agreement statistic across independent labelers on the same items

exact_quotes.exact_quote: However, an incorrect heater-shaker module method name was used. Upon making this mistake, Coscientist uses the Docs searcher module to consult the OT-2 documentation. Next, Coscientist modifies the protocol to a corrected version, which ran successfully.
The normalized advantage values increase over time, suggesting that the model can effectively reuse the information obtained to provide more specific guidance on reactivity.

recommendations.proposed_action: Report aggregate statistics over many runs for the error-detection-and-repair loop, including how often execution failures are correctly diagnosed and repaired versus repeated or compounded.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Rates reported with uncertainty intervals against a no-feedback baseline
success_check.evidence_needed: Full execution traces and outcome labels for every run in the set
success_check.observable: Repair rate and residual-failure rate across a documented set of runs containing execution errors

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Although our setup is not yet fully automated (plates were moved manually), no human decision-making was involved.
Because of safety concerns, data, code and prompts will be only fully released after the development of US regulations in the field of artificial intelligence and its scientific applications.
Access to documentation enables us to provide sufficient information for Coscientist to conduct experiments in the physical world.
For this investigation, we did not grant access to the internet.

recommendations.proposed_action: Establish a gated or third-party-mediated audit path for the prompts, documentation corpus and execution traces so the validator channels gating physical actions can be independently reviewed despite the stated safety hold on full release.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: At least one external reviewer able to reproduce the reported error-correction episode
success_check.evidence_needed: Access records and a written independent replication or audit report
success_check.observable: Existence of an independent review of the prompts, documentation corpus and execution traces

memory_structure: message history of user input and command outputs supplied to the Planner
accumulated experimental information reused across iterations
policy_type: LLM planner driven by user input and command outputs
iterative experiment selection informed by prior measured outcomes
